title: heuchera micrantha var. nuttallii
intro: Heuchera micrantha var. nuttallii is a variety of the Alumroot plant, which is a species of flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Heuchera micrantha var. nuttallii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. Heuchera micrantha var. nuttallii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in salves and creams to take advantage of its topical medicinal properties.
